title: Admiral Dodonna's flagship
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Kotorships_copy.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Forn Dodonna]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] accompanied by two other [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruisers]].]]
{{Quote|There! A break in the Sith formation! Green Squadron, move in!|Admiral Dodonna at the Battle of Rakata Prime|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
The '''unnamed flagship''' of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Forn Dodonna]] was a [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruiser]] that saw extensive service within the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Aboard this ship, the admiral directed the [[Battle of Rakata Prime]] along with numerous other ''Hammerhead''-class [[Warship/Legends|warships]] and [[Foray-class blockade runner|''Foray''-class blockade runners]]. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Vandar Tokare]] was also aboard this vessel during the engagement against the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] forces under [[Darth Malak]], which consisted of [[Interdictor-class cruiser|''Interdictor''-class cruisers]], in an effort to coordinate a Jedi strike team to board the [[Star Forge]] and disrupt the [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]] being used by the fallen [[Bastila Shan]].

The Jedi, along with the help of the redeemed [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and his companions, were able to penetrate the outer defenses of the Star Forge. Revan himself confronted Bastila; during the duel that ensued he was able to draw on their [[Force-bond/Legends|Force bond]] and the love they shared to redeem her; as a result Shan reversed her battle meditation, using it to aid the Republic fleet while causing the Sith forces to fall apart. Aboard her [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], Admiral Dodonna gave the orders that turned the tide of the battle, sending [[Green Squadron (Galactic Republic)|Green Squadron]] into the fray to exploit a break in the Sith formations. Reinforced by [[Red Squadron (Galactic Republic)/Legends|Red Squadron]] and the fleet's [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], Dodonna's forces were able to widen the breach; almost immediately Malak's forces fell into disarray. The fleet then moved in to bombard the massive [[Space station/Legends|space station]] and factory; after destroying the Forge's main orbital stabilizers, Admiral Dodonna ordered the fleet to fall back lest they be caught in the massive explosion that followed.

==Behind the scenes==
If the player chooses the dark path, this vessel is destroyed by numerous slashing attacks by [[Sith fighter]]s in a cutscene appropriately entitled "Dodonna's End".

Though the ship is [[canon]]ical, it has yet to receive a name. In addition, among the several ''Hammerhead''-class ships seen during the battle sequences at the end of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', no distinguishing characteristics are discernible, leaving the admiral's [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] nearly impossible to positively identify.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
